title: lathyrus niger f. angulatus
intro: Lathyrus niger f. angulatus, also known as the Purple Pea or Purple Vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus niger f. angulatus include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb, and is often used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and health.
